prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d749d46f`.
codex_response:
Implemented `d749d46f` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: read the left-to-right top-anchored foreground rectangles, map each rectangle `(h, w)` to `a = min(h, w)` and `b = max(h, w)`, then place `a x b` rectangles across the top of a 10-row canvas and `b x a` rectangles across the bottom on an independent left-to-right track.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as the starting hypothesis and discarded the Sonnet hint; its divider/reflection explanation was inconsistent with the official examples, and that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d749d46f/notes.md). The generator stays on-family by sampling 4-6 top-anchored solid rectangles with one-column gaps, keeping the background dominant as in the official task. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end to end: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, shared build produced the required artifacts, and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d749d46f/previews/preview_01.png).

Files:
- Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d749d46f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d749d46f/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d749d46f/generator.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d749d46f/notes.md)
- Generated data: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d749d46f/task.json)
- Previews: [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d749d46f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d749d46f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d749d46f/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d749d46f/previews/preview_03.png)
